schema_note: Official override mechanism for known-stale data. Use when (1) data is past warn/error threshold per data/freshness-policy.json, but (2) the operator has confirmed this is the best-available data and pushing with staleness is acceptable. Each override documents: which field, why it can't be refreshed, when the override expires, who signed off. Validator / release-precheck / synthesise.mjs all read this file and suppress corresponding warnings (changing them from error/warn to 'OVERRIDE' status). Empty overrides = no overrides active.

override_policy.purpose: Allow push with known-stale data when no better source is available, with audit trail.
override_policy.suppresses: Warnings/errors in source-validator and release-precheck for the matching (file, source_key, retrieved_date) combo.
override_policy.does_not_suppress: PII hits, tier_5 social media URLs, or JSON parse errors. Those remain hard blocks.
override_policy.audit: Each override is signed + dated + has an expiration. Expired overrides are treated as if absent (warning re-fires).
override_policy.best_practice: Override should be the LAST resort. If a data source can be re-fetched, refresh the retrieved date instead of using this file.

overrides.override_reason: Historical SkillSelect round. DHA does not re-publish old round data after program year close. This is the official archive snapshot. Re-fetching from DHA SkillSelect dashboard would not return a fresher 'retrieved' date — the data itself is the historical truth.
verification_steps_taken: Checked DHA SkillSelect previous-rounds page — past rounds listed but no refresh date
Confirmed with visaiq / immitrend / ONEderland archives — same data, all cite DHA as source
Verdict: this is the canonical historical record, not a stale fetch

overrides.override_reason: Same as skillselect-2023-05-25-historical. Historical SkillSelect round, no DHA refresh mechanism.
Most recent round before this v0.3.1 release. Re-fetch from DHA for next release (v0.3.2 or later).
overrides.action_required: Re-fetch from https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/skillselect/previous-rounds before 2026-09-30, or extend override.

use: Both bin/source-validator.mjs and bin/release-precheck.mjs read this file. For each warning/error of the form 'data stale / expired (N days > M day threshold, data_type=X) — YYYY-MM-DD', check if (file, retrieved_date, data_type) matches any override. If yes AND override not expired, suppress the warning/error and add '[OVERRIDE: <id>]' annotation to validator output.
